title: Skyrim Music Pack
description: Immerse yourself in Skyrim's beautiful soundtrack as you explore!
body:
Taking inspiration from my Morrowind Music Pack, here's one that adds Skyrim's soundtrack to the game instead. Contains over 40 tracks, including the Dawnguard and Dragonborn DLCs. Includes custom music toasts in English US. Pack also supports Aether, Twilight Forest, Biomes O' Plenty, and YUNG's Cave Biomes.

Video demonstration coming soon TM.
